title: athanasia crithmifolia
intro: Athanasia crithmifolia, also known as Sea Spurge, is a succulent plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its spiny stems and yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Athanasia crithmifolia include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for skin conditions and wounds. Herbal preparations of Athanasia crithmifolia include tinctures, infusions, and creams, which can be used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
